solo-help: Show the full Solo Squad command catalog (all /solo-*) with short when-to-use hints. Use with /solo-help or when you forget a command.
solo-status: Check which Solo Squad skills are still active in this chat. Use with /solo-status.
solo-modernize: Modernize a legacy app: stack audit, dependencies, migration strategy (strangler/incremental), risk register. Phase 0 before scout. Use with /solo-modernize.
solo-scout: Problem analysis + integrated grill-me-product. Interview assumptions, scope, edge cases, stack recommendations. Use with /solo-scout — no separate skill needed.
solo-add-feature: Add a feature to an existing app — orchestrates scout→blueprint→build→test→ship. Vertical slices, follow existing patterns. Use with /solo-add-feature.
solo-blueprint: Planning + integrated grill-me-architecture. Phases, tasks, Mermaid diagrams required. Use with /solo-blueprint — no separate architecture skill needed.
solo-backend: Backend implementer + integrated Engineering Best Practices. One command: Laravel/API, DB, auth, OWASP. Use with /solo-backend — no separate skill needed.
solo-frontend: Frontend implementer + integrated Taste Skill. One command: project structure, API wiring, anti-slop UI. Use with /solo-frontend — no separate design skill needed.
solo-test: Testing + integrated Test-Driven Development. Strategy, write tests, run, report results. Red-green-refactor, test pyramid. Use with /solo-test.
solo-review: Multi-axis code quality review (correctness, readability, architecture, security, performance). One command before merge. Use with /solo-review.
solo-security: Security audit & hardening (legacy or new apps). STRIDE threat model, OWASP, boundary checklist. One command for existing apps. Use with /solo-security.
solo-pentest: Controlled web pentest on staging/localhost (OWASP WSTG). Grey/black-box, pairs with solo-security. Use with /solo-pentest — requires scope & authorization.
solo-dependabot: Check GitHub Dependabot alerts (repo or org) via gh API, triage severity, cross-check local npm/composer audit. Use with /solo-dependabot.
solo-ship: Release + integrated Shipping and Launch. Semver, changelog, GitHub tag, production deploy checklist. Human-in-the-loop. Use with /solo-ship.
solo-docs: Documentation + integrated Documentation and ADRs. System docs, user guides, ADRs. All diagrams must be Mermaid. Modes: system, user, both. Use with /solo-docs.
solo-ponytail: Enable lazy senior dev mode (full). Simplest solution that actually works — YAGNI, stdlib first, native platform. Use with /solo-ponytail.
solo-ponytail-ultra: Ponytail ultra mode — extreme YAGNI. Challenge requirements, delete before adding. Use with /solo-ponytail-ultra.
solo-ponytail-review: Code review focused on over-engineering. Find what can be removed. Use with /solo-ponytail-review.
solo-ponytail-status: Check if Ponytail mode is active in this chat. Short answer: YES or NO. Use with /solo-ponytail-status.
